mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS name, COUNT(p.id) AS value FROM category c LEFT JOIN product p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.id

SELECT to_char(d.day, 'MM-DD') AS day, COUNT(o.id) AS count FROM generate_series(current_date - interval '6 day', current_date, interval '1 day') d(day) LEFT JOIN order_info o ON date(o.create_time) = d.day GROUP BY d.day ORDER BY d.day
